divine_intervention_edges.text: No one ever complains about his provision but that Allah provides for him from an unexpected source
divine_intervention_edges.notes: Du'a can cause miraculous sustenance beyond natural causes

divine_intervention_edges.text: The first matter that the servant will be brought to account for on the Day of Judgment is the prayer
divine_intervention_edges.notes: Prayer can directly influence divine guidance

divine_intervention_edges.text: Unquestionably, by the remembrance of Allah hearts are reassured
If one of you is perplexed, let him pray Istikhara
